```{r VC application density rate table}

total_denominators |>
    mutate(
        cat = translations$devs$VC$PVC$name,
        !!translations$devs$VC$days.abbr := NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_SUM,
        !!translations$globalTable$PooledMean := NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_SUM / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 100,
        .keep = "none") |>
  bind_cols(
    department_denominators |>
      mutate(dens = NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_SUM / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 100, .keep = "none") |>
      reframe(tibble(value = quantile(dens, prob = c(.25,.5,.75)), name = c(translations$globalTable$Q1, translations$globalTable$Median, translations$globalTable$Q3))) |>
      pivot_wider()) |>
  bind_rows(
    total_denominators |>
      mutate(
        cat = translations$devs$VC$CVC$name,
        !!translations$devs$VC$days.abbr := NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_SUM,
        !!translations$globalTable$PooledMean := NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_SUM / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 100,
        .keep = "none") |>
      bind_cols(
        department_denominators |>
          mutate(dens = NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_SUM / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 100, .keep = "none") |>
          reframe(tibble(value = quantile(dens, prob = c(.25,.5,.75)), name = c(translations$globalTable$Q1, translations$globalTable$Median, translations$globalTable$Q3))) |>
          pivot_wider())
  ) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "cat") |>
  tab_options(table.width = pct(100)) |>
  tab_header(title = translations$devs$VC$days) |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = translations$devs$VC$days.abbr, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = translations$devs$VC$density_rate,
    columns = c(translations$globalTable$PooledMean, translations$globalTable$Q1, translations$globalTable$Median, translations$globalTable$Q3),
    id = "vc_density_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_stub()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(paste(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        translations$devs$VC$CVC$density_rate,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        translations$devs$VC$CVC$days.sum,
        "}}{\\text{",
        translations$pats$days,
        "}} \\times 100$$"
      ),
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        translations$devs$VC$PVC$density_rate,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        translations$devs$VC$PVC$days.sum,
        "}}{\\text{",
        translations$pats$days,
        "}} \\times 100$$"
        ),
      sep = "\n\n")),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "vc_density_rate")
  )

```
